description: baseline: fp32 eager, 4L d512 h32 dff1344 SwiGLU RoPE, LR3e-3 warmup2000 cosT100k, bs32; 926 steps MFU0.62% (throughput-bound, warmup never completed; COLD page-cache)

E5 torch.compile(dynamic=False); 12290 steps (+30%), MFU 8.24%

E16 COMPLIANCE FIX: hand-written attention+softmax, custom AdamW(Optimizer base), custom clip; keep bf16/compile/TF32/tying. +0.047 vs non-compliant E13 (9% fewer tokens 154.7M). NEW COMPLIANT REFERENCE.
E17 selective weight decay (no-WD on 1D + tied emb); WORSE +0.056 (WD on tied embedding is beneficial - regularizes logit scale) -> reset to E16
E18 QK-norm (RMSNorm on per-head Q,K before RoPE); loss -0.040; nearly erases compliance cost. new compliant best
E19 throughput reclaim: branchless _foreach clip (no per-step sync) + eval prewarm + valid_interval 2500; +5.6M tokens (156.3M), loss +0.0036 (within noise; kept for throughput+simplicity)
E20 seed RNG (manual_seed 0) for clean A/B; same code as E19 but seed-0 draw = 3.807 (vs 3.825) => unseeded noise ~0.018. SEEDED REFERENCE. (repro re-run 3.805 => seeded noise ~0.002)

E25 MUON optimizer (Newton-Schulz orthogonalized momentum) for 2D hidden weights, AdamW for emb+norms, muon_lr 0.02; loss -0.059 despite 8% fewer tokens! biggest win since throughput. new best, beats non-compliant E13
